summary: Serbia Executive Access page testing complete. All features verified: page renders correctly with video intro, three service sections (Government Relations, Infrastructure & PPP, Incentives & Subsidies), Executive Inquiry form with mocked submission, ShareButtons with all social platforms, and Comments section with backend API integration.

issues.description: Executive Inquiry form submission is MOCKED - no backend endpoint exists. Submissions are simulated in frontend only.

seed_data_creation: Test comments created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests - automatically cleaned up via admin API delete
